input.background: Would you use a one-sample, paired-sample, or independent-sample $t$ procedure in the following situations?
input.question: A different technician compares the concentration of ten specimens using two different assay kits. Ten measurements are taken with each kit. Results are then compared.

Specimen_Concentration_Kit1.value: Concentration measurements from assay kit 1 for ten specimens
Specimen_Concentration_Kit1.description: Concentration values measured using the first assay kit for each of the ten specimens.

Specimen_Concentration_Kit2.value: Concentration measurements from assay kit 2 for ten specimens
Specimen_Concentration_Kit2.description: Concentration values measured using the second assay kit for each of the ten specimens.
